parsed.production_notes: The top panel features an AI-generated avatar, indicated by the perfectly static background, slightly unnatural lip-sync, and overly smooth features. The bottom panel is human-recorded, showing natural micro-movements and lighting.

characters.appearance: Young female, fair complexion, blonde hair parted in the middle. Smooth, symmetrical facial features.
Young female, fair complexion, dark hair pulled back tightly. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Maroon knit sweater, gold necklace, and small hoop earrings.

scenes.setting: Top: Office environment. Bottom: Plain wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character A. She is positioned in an office setting. Behind her, a desk with a computer monitor displaying a blue screen is visible, along with a window letting in natural light. The lighting on her face is bright and even. She maintains a calm, professional expression, looking directly at the camera.

A medium close-up of Character B. She is positioned against a plain, light-colored wall. The lighting is soft and natural. She uses hand gestures as she speaks, displaying a range of expressions from confused to relieved. She looks directly at the camera.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with Character A on top and Character B on the bottom. Both characters appear to be conversing with each other. Speech bubbles with text appear over their respective panels as they speak. Flash sale promotional stickers are overlaid on the right side of both panels.

Character A says: Always available, always correcting you
